analyst_note: Telecom annual & sustainability report. Strong climate disclosure — science-based targets 1.5C-aligned, near-dated net-zero (2035) with 2027/2029 milestones, 2019 baseline, KPMG limited assurance. One MED (limited assurance level).

specificity.quote: aiming for net zero greenhouse gas [emissions] ... targeting net-zero by 2035

metric.quote: target of 30% take-back by 2030 ... Reduction of Scope 1 and 2
metric.reasoning: Quantified emissions and circularity targets with reported progress.

target.quote: the Science Based Targets initiative and includes ... align with the 1.5C ambition
target.reasoning: Science-based targets aligned to a 1.5C ambition via the Climate Transition Plan.

time_horizon.quote: emissions in Scope 1 and 2 by 2029 ... net-zero by 2035
time_horizon.reasoning: Near-term 2027/2029 milestones present alongside the 2035 net-zero endpoint.

scope.quote: data (Scopes 1-3) is reported in line with the Greenhouse Gas Protocol
scope.reasoning: Scopes 1, 2 and 3 reported per the GHG Protocol.

verification.quote: Tele2's auditor KPMG has conducted a limited assurance
verification.reasoning: Externally assured by KPMG, but a limited assurance level.

consistency.quote: Climate Transition Plan that align with the 1.5C ambition
consistency.reasoning: Documented Climate Transition Plan; capex disclosed; no contradiction surfaced.
